# WanderVox - AI Travel Translation App

> WanderVox is a voice and photo translation app for travelers. It supports 49 languages with real-time voice translation, smart camera translation for menus and signs, cultural tips for 51 destinations, a dated trip planner with booking reminders, and AI-curated local recommendations.

## Key Facts
- Voice-to-voice translation in 49 languages
- Smart camera translates menus (with allergen and dietary flags) and signs
- Cultural guide: phrases, tips, do's and don'ts, gestures, food guides for 51 destinations
- Trip Planner: dated itinerary for flights, hotels, restaurants, activities; booking reminders; live currency converter; saved places
- Explore: AI-curated local recommendations (street food, hidden gems, nightlife, nature, art)
- Emergency info: local emergency numbers and safety phrases for supported destinations with global defaults; always free
- Conversation mode, phrase audio playback, taxi card, dual home/destination clock, dietary preferences
- Android offline typed translation via on-device ML Kit; voice and camera require a connection
- Anonymous-first — no signup needed; optional Google Sign-In preserves identity across reinstalls (trip data stays on device)
- Available on Android (iOS in development)
- Free tier: 5 voice translations/day, 3 camera scans/day
- Pro plans (USD; Google Play charges local currency at purchase): Trip Pass $2.99/week, Monthly $6.99, Annual $49.99

## What WanderVox has that Google Translate does not
- Dated trip planner with booking reminders and saved places
- Live currency converter on the trip screen
- Cultural guide with phrases, etiquette, and food per destination (cached offline)
- Dietary allergen detection on menu scans
- Taxi card (destination shown in local language and script)

## Links
- Website: https://wandervox.app
- Privacy Policy: https://wandervox.app/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://wandervox.app/terms
